title: Maximum Absolute Sum of Any Subarray
titleCn: 任意子数组和的绝对值的最大值

testcases.input: nums = [1,-3,2,3,-4] Output: 5 Explanation: The subarray [2,3] has absolute sum = abs(2+3) = abs(5) = 5.
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: The subarray [2,3] has absolute sum = abs(2+3) = abs(5) = 5.

testcases.input: nums = [2,-5,1,-4,3,-2] Output: 8 Explanation: The subarray [-5,1,-4] has absolute sum = abs(-5+1-4) = abs(-8) = 8.
testcases.expectedOutput: 8 Explanation: The subarray [-5,1,-4] has absolute sum = abs(-5+1-4) = abs(-8) = 8.
